name: Orange Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter and sugar well until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in eggs, one at a time, ensuring each is fully incorporated before adding the next.
4. Add grated orange rind and mix thoroughly.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Gradually add alternating parts of the flour mixture to the butter-sugar-egg mixture (starting and ending with the flour mixture).
7. Mix in the prepared orange juice in two additions, ensuring each addition is fully incorporated before adding the next.
8. Spread batter evenly into two greased 9-inch round layer pans.
9. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow cakes to cool completely before icing with Orange Icing from a separate recipe.
